name: Priya Chakraborty
brief: I'm a data scientist at Swiss Re in Zurich. I moved here from India in 2022 and transitioned from Quellensteuer to ordinary taxation in 2024. On weekends I do freelance ML consulting — I have four clients this year. I also invest through Interactive Brokers. I'm not sure how to handle the freelance income or the foreign brokerage on my Swiss taxes.
